description: Create a manufacturing drawing for laser cutting gaskets. The drawing must include three layers: 'STOCK' (White/Black) containing a 200x200mm square boundary, 'CUT' (Red) containing four nested gaskets, and 'ETCH' (Blue) containing the text 'G-01' for each gasket. Each gasket must have an 80mm Outer Diameter, 50mm Inner Diameter, and four 6mm bolt holes on a 65mm bolt circle. Ensure the gaskets are nested within the stock boundary without overlapping and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/gasket_nesting.dxf.
